home.name: Yosra Mohsen
home.description: It started with a Figma frame. Then I wanted to see it actually move — so I learned Flutter, and never looked back. Now I live between two worlds: designing interfaces that feel human, and building apps that actually work. Turns out, doing both is my superpower.

16.title: Self-Development & Mindful Tracker (Mobile App)
16.description:
Developed a high-performance, scalable self-development and mindfulness mobile application using Flutter, adhering to Clean Architecture principles for maximum maintainability and testability.

Technical Highlights:
• Architecture: Implemented Clean Architecture (Data, Domain, and Presentation layers) ensuring a separation of concerns and robust code structure.
• State Management: Utilized BLoC (Business Logic Component) for predictable, reactive, and efficient state management across the app.
• Backend & Database: Integrated Supabase for real-time database capabilities, fast data retrieval, and seamless user authentication.
• Services: Leveraged Firebase services for cloud messaging, push notifications, and analytics to enhance user engagement.

17.title: Al-Momayaz: All-in-One Mobility & Logistics Platform
17.description: Designed a massive, high-traffic super-app for ride-hailing, group transits, and courier/cargo delivery services in Jordan. Orchestrated the entire product design ecosystem from scratch, scaling it to over 300+ high-fidelity screens. The app is fully launched on Google Play and Apple Store, actively serving more than 20K+ users.

0.title: Mongiz: AI-Powered Motivation
0.description: A high-performance Flutter app designed to boost productivity through goal decomposition and daily motivation. Features seamless Firebase authentication, Supabase real-time notifications, and advanced state management for a robust user experience.

1.title: Comprehensive EdTech Ecosystem (LMS)
1.description: A scalable EdTech solution for students, teachers, and admins, built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. Implemented Cubit for robust state management and integrated complex APIs to deliver a high-performance educational experience.

2.title: ElectroHub: Advanced E-Commerce Flutter App
2.description: Developed a high-performance electronics marketplace using Flutter and MVVM architecture. Integrated professional GitHub version control and clean code practices to deliver a scalable, feature-rich shopping experience.

3.title: Full-Stack Flutter Portfolio: Clean Architecture & State Management
3.description: An advanced Flutter implementation of a custom design system, mirroring Figma styles in code with support for dynamic modes, localization, and parallax animations.

4.title: Self-Development & Mindful Tracker (Mobile App)
4.description:
Developed a high-performance, scalable self-development and mindfulness mobile application using Flutter, adhering to Clean Architecture principles for maximum maintainability and testability.

Technical Highlights:
• Architecture: Implemented Clean Architecture (Data, Domain, and Presentation layers) ensuring a separation of concerns and robust code structure.
• State Management: Utilized BLoC (Business Logic Component) for predictable, reactive, and efficient state management across the app.
• Backend & Database: Integrated Supabase for real-time database capabilities, fast data retrieval, and seamless user authentication.
• Services: Leveraged Firebase services for cloud messaging, push notifications, and analytics to enhance user engagement.

5.title: CarCare: On-Demand Auto Maintenance & Roadside Assistance
5.description:
Developed a comprehensive, end-to-end automotive services mobile application from scratch. Built entirely with Flutter and adhering to Clean Architecture, the app seamlessly connects users in Riyadh with car maintenance, towing, and replacement car services, integrated with an advanced multi-point payment system.

Technical Highlights:
• Architecture & Patterns: Built the entire app using Clean Architecture (Data, Domain, Presentation) combined with BLoC for highly predictable, scalable, and testable state management.
• API Integration: Designed and integrated complex RESTful APIs for real-time data handling, service booking, and status tracking.
• Maps & Geolocation: Integrated Google Maps API for precise location tracking, enabling real-time towing (roadside assistance) dispatch and workshop routing within Riyadh.
• Advanced Payment System: Implemented a secure multi-point payment infrastructure integrated across 5 distinct checkout flows within the app (e.g., booking deposit, final invoice, towing fees, rental security, and premium upgrades).
• Core Features Implemented: Smart Maintenance Booking (scheduling workshops with dynamic availability), Roadside & Towing Services (on-demand towing requests with live map tracking), Alternative Car Rental (replacement car booking system), and Riyadh-Focused Localization address handling.

about.title: About Me
about.role: Product Designer & UI/UX Specialist | Flutter Developer
about.description: The Architect of Experience. With 3 years in UI/UX and 5 years in Graphic Design, I don't just "draw" apps—I engineer them. Now, as a Flutter Developer, I bring those designs to life, ensuring the soul of the creative vision survives every line of code. I bridge the gap between "what's beautiful" and "what actually works."
